samples.gvd:
module counter_12(
    input rst_n,
    input clk,
    input valid_count,
    output reg [3:0] out
);

    always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
        if (!rst_n) begin
            out <= 4'b0000;
        end
        else if (valid_count) begin
            if (out == 4'd11) begin
                out <= 4'b0000;
            end
            else begin
                out <= out + 1;
            end
        end
    end

endmodule
samples.xml_description:
<module id="counter_12">
    <description>Counter from 0 to 11, controlled by valid_count.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low)</input>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal</input>
        <input id="valid_count">Enable counting</input>
        <output id="out" width_description="[3:0]">Current count</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="STATE_IDLE" value="0x0">Idle state</enum>
        <enum id="STATE_COUNT" value="0x1">Counting state</enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="state" type="sequential_logic" width_description="[0:0]">
            <description>Current state of the counter</description>
        </reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <case>
            <item>
                <when>!rst_n</when>
                <then>
                    <assign name="out" value="4'b0000"/>
                    <assign name="state" value="STATE_IDLE"/>
                </then>
            </item>
            <item>
                <when>state == STATE_IDLE</when>
                <then>
                    <if>
                        <condition>valid_count == 1'b1</condition>
                        <then>
                            <assign name="state" value="STATE_COUNT"/>
                        </then>
                    </if>
                </then>
            </item>
            <item>
                <when>state == STATE_COUNT</when>
                <then>
                    <if>
                        <condition>out == 4'd11</condition>
                        <then>
                            <assign name="out" value="4'b0000"/>
                            <assign name="state" value="STATE_IDLE"/>
                        </then>
                        <else>
                            <assign name="out" value="out + 1"/>
                        </else>
                    </if>
                </then>
            </item>
        </case>
    </implementation>
</module>
